steps.action: Instantiate CascadeEngine with locked_baseline dependency_graph
steps.expected: Engine initializes with valid execution order
steps.observed: Engine initialized with 14 nodes

steps.action: Verify all dependency constraints in execution order
steps.expected: Every upstream dep appears before its downstream node
steps.observed: All 14 ordering constraints satisfied: asia_range, displacement, fvg, bpr, ifvg, reference_levels, session_liquidity, swing_points, equal_hl, htf_liquidity, liquidity_sweep, mss, order_block, ote

steps.action: Verify leaf nodes have no upstream dependencies
steps.expected: fvg, swing_points, displacement, asia_range, session_liquidity, reference_levels have upstream=[]
steps.observed: All 6 leaf nodes confirmed as having empty upstream lists

evidence.terminalOutput: Execution order: ['asia_range', 'displacement', 'fvg', 'bpr', 'ifvg', 'reference_levels', 'session_liquidity', 'swing_points', 'equal_hl', 'htf_liquidity', 'liquidity_sweep', 'mss', 'order_block', 'ote']. All dependency constraints verified.

steps.action: Run full cascade with locked params
steps.observed: All 14 primitives ran, results cached

steps.action: Call on_param_change('displacement')
steps.expected: displacement + MSS + order_block + ote invalidated; fvg, swing_points NOT invalidated
steps.observed: Invalidated: ['displacement', 'liquidity_sweep', 'mss', 'order_block', 'ote']. fvg, swing_points, asia_range, session_liquidity, reference_levels NOT invalidated

evidence.terminalOutput: Invalidated nodes: ['displacement', 'liquidity_sweep', 'mss', 'order_block', 'ote']. Independent nodes fvg, swing_points confirmed NOT invalidated.

steps.action: Run full cascade with locked params
steps.observed: First run produced results for 28 (primitive, tf) pairs

steps.action: Run identical cascade a second time
steps.observed: All 12 primitives returned cache hits. Results are identical object references (no re-computation).

evidence.terminalOutput: Cache hit for all 12 primitives: asia_range, displacement, fvg, reference_levels, session_liquidity, swing_points, equal_hl, htf_liquidity, liquidity_sweep, mss, order_block, ote

steps.action: Run full cascade including equal_hl (DEFERRED)
steps.expected: No error; equal_hl provides empty DetectionResult with DEFERRED status
steps.observed: Full cascade completed without error. equal_hl has 3 timeframe results, all with 0 detections and status=DEFERRED

evidence.terminalOutput: equal_hl: 1m=0 detections (DEFERRED), 5m=0 detections (DEFERRED), 15m=0 detections (DEFERRED). All other detectors produced expected counts.

steps.action: Run: python3 run.py --config configs/locked_baseline.yaml --data data/eurusd_1m_2024-01-07_to_2024-01-12.csv --output /tmp/ra_test_output/
steps.expected: Exit code 0, output directory populated with JSON files
steps.observed: Exit code 0. 29 JSON files produced in /tmp/ra_test_output/ including all detector outputs and cascade_summary.json. Total: 9,784 detections.

steps.action: Verify output file count and content
steps.expected: Output files for all primitives across timeframes
steps.observed: 29 files: fvg (3 TFs), swing_points (3), displacement (3), mss (3), order_block (3), ote (3), liquidity_sweep (3), htf_liquidity (1), asia_range (1), reference_levels (1), session_liquidity (1), equal_hl (3), cascade_summary (1)

evidence.terminalOutput: CLI exit code 0. 29 output files in /tmp/ra_test_output/. Cascade complete: 14 primitives, 9784 total detections.

steps.action: Run: pytest tests/test_regression.py -v --tb=short -q --no-header -p no:cacheprovider
steps.observed: 52 passed in 3.31s

steps.action: Run: pytest tests/test_cascade.py -v --tb=short -q --no-header -p no:cacheprovider
steps.observed: 22 passed in 34.72s

evidence.terminalOutput: test_regression.py: 52 passed in 3.31s. test_cascade.py: 22 passed in 34.72s.

steps.action: Run cascade and inspect FVG 5m detections
steps.expected: 345 FVGs with IFVG state tracking fields
steps.observed: 345 FVG detections. 322 have ce_touched_bar/time, 308 have boundary_closed_bar/time. All state transition fields consistent.

steps.action: Verify ifvg/bpr virtual nodes handled
steps.expected: Virtual nodes in results (empty, handled by parent FVG detector)
steps.observed: ifvg and bpr exist in results with empty dicts (virtual nodes skipped by cascade, logic embedded in FVG detector)

steps.action: Verify FVG IDs follow deterministic format
steps.observed: All FVG IDs match pattern, e.g., fvg_5m_2024-01-07T17:00:00_bear

evidence.terminalOutput: FVG 5m: 345 detections. CE-touched: 322. Boundary-closed: 308. ifvg/bpr virtual nodes handled.

steps.action: Run cascade and check MSS 5m count
steps.observed: 44 MSS detections on 5m

steps.action: Check OB 5m count
steps.observed: 37 OB detections on 5m

steps.action: Run cascade and inspect sweep 5m base sweep source distribution
steps.observed: ASIA_H_L:3, LONDON_H_L:2, LTF_BOX:6, PDH_PDL:2, PROMOTED_SWING:1 (total 14). Also: 11 qualified, 15 delayed, 10 continuation.

evidence.terminalOutput: Base sweep source distribution: LTF_BOX:6, ASIA_H_L:3, LONDON_H_L:2, PDH_PDL:2, PROMOTED_SWING:1. Total: 14 base, 11 qualified, 15 delayed, 10 continuation.

steps.action: Run cascade with default params and record FVG/swing/disp counts
Change fvg.params.floor_threshold_pips from 0.5 to 2.0 and re-run
steps.expected: Swing and displacement counts unchanged (independent branches)
steps.observed: Swing and displacement counts identical across all TFs. FVG counts also unchanged (floor_threshold_pips is metadata annotation, not hard filter).

evidence.terminalOutput: swing_points and displacement counts unchanged across 1m/5m/15m after FVG param change.

steps.action: Run cascade twice (with cache clear between), compare all detection IDs
steps.expected: All 9,784 IDs identical between runs; format follows {primitive}_{tf}_{timestamp_ny}_{direction}
steps.observed: All 9,784 IDs match between two runs. ID format: e.g., fvg_5m_2024-01-08T09:10:00_bull, swing_points_1m_2024-01-07T17:09:00_low. 4 HTF IDs use 'H1'/'H4' TF notation which is valid.

evidence.terminalOutput: Checked 9784 detection IDs: ALL deterministic matches. Sample: fvg_1m_2024-01-07T17:04:00_bear, swing_points_1m_2024-01-07T17:09:00_low, mss_1m_2024-01-07T18:24:00_bear, ob_1m_2024-01-07T18:22:00_bear.

assertions.title: Ghost bar handling across all detectors

steps.action: Identify ghost bars (is_ghost==True) per timeframe
steps.observed: 0 ghost bars in 1m, 0 ghost bars in 5m, 0 ghost bars in 15m (dataset has no ghost bars)

steps.action: Verify no candle-pattern detection anchors on a ghost bar index
steps.observed: Checked 9,512 detections across fvg, swing_points, displacement, mss, order_block, liquidity_sweep: 0 ghost bar violations

evidence.terminalOutput: 0 ghost bars in dataset. 9,512 detections checked, 0 violations. Note: dataset contains no ghost bars (all bars have volume > 0), so constraint is trivially satisfied. Ghost bar filtering logic exists in detectors but is not exercised by this dataset.

assertions.issues: Dataset contains no ghost bars (volume > 0 for all bars), so ghost bar filtering is not actively exercised. The test confirms no false anchoring but cannot verify the filtering code path is triggered.

frictions.description: Data module imports differ from common patterns (ra.data.csv_loader.load_csv instead of ra.data.loader.load_bars) — required inspecting module structure
Detection objects use 'properties' dict (not 'fields') and 'type' attribute for sweep categories — required inspecting Detection dataclass
frictions.resolution: Read ra.engine.base.Detection to discover correct attribute names (id, time, direction, type, price, properties, tags, upstream_refs)

summary: Tested 12 assertions: 12 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Cascade engine correctly handles topological ordering (14 nodes), cache invalidation on param change, result caching on identical re-runs, and DEFERRED module graceful skip. CLI exits 0 with 29 output files. All 52 regression tests and 22 cascade tests pass. Cross-area flows verified: FVG->IFVG/BPR wiring, Swing->MSS->OB chain (44 MSS, 37 OB on 5m), multi-source sweep assembly (14 base sweeps matching expected distribution), config isolation, deterministic IDs (9,784 checked), and ghost bar compliance (0 violations).
